# isEditable

**Instance Property**

Indicates whether the asset is editable.

## Declaration

```swift
var isEditable: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

The property value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the application is able to edit the asset, and [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] if the application is not able to edit the asset. Applications are only allowed to edit assets that they originally wrote.

## Asset Properties

- **value(forProperty:)**: Returns the value for a given property.
- **original**: The original version of the asset.
